LHX.sentence: No fresh news on L3Harris today, but it's the smallest of the big U.S. defense contractors and tends to trade a little cheaper than its larger rivals, which is the usual backdrop for it.

ASML.sentence: ASML is barely moving, which is fine — they're the only company on earth that makes the machines for printing the most advanced chips, and their earnings are just starting to recover from a slow patch.

LIN.sentence: Linde ticked up a touch and there's really no drama here — hospitals and factories keep buying their gases under long contracts, and the price they get is right in line with rivals.

MSFT.sentence: Microsoft is quiet today — the AI cloud story keeps grinding along in the background without any drama.

TMO.sentence: Thermo Fisher had a nice up day, and while lab-equipment demand has been unusually slow lately, that softness is expected to ease as their customers start spending again.

ENB.sentence: Enbridge is calm, though its dividend payout isn't as generous relative to safe bonds as it usually is, so the extra reward for holding this pipeline toll-road is a bit thin right now.

NOW.sentence: No new data on ServiceNow today, but big companies and government agencies keep signing up for its software that automates their tedious internal paperwork.

GLNCY.sentence: Glencore slipped a little today even as copper prices jumped, so this miner is lagging behind a metal it profits from and may have some catching up to do.

IBIT.sentence: Bitcoin bounced today but is still well below where it was earlier in the year, so this one is deep in a slump for now.

KOF.sentence: Coca-Cola FEMSA drifted higher and looks reasonably priced for a company that dominates Coke bottling across Latin America and pays a steady dividend.

PBR.A.sentence: Petrobras rose a bit but has fallen sharply from its recent levels, leaving this big Brazilian oil dividend-payer looking beaten down right now.

AMKBY.sentence: Maersk, the Danish container-shipping giant, had a mild up day, and its shares are priced below the value of the ships and assets it actually owns.
